source:
# Cell 1 - Read all CSV files from Bronze layer

storage_account = "hospitalprojectdatalake"
bronze_path = f"abfss://bronze@{storage_account}.dfs.core.windows.net"

# Read all datasets
df_patients = spark.read.option("header", True).option("inferSchema", True).csv(f"{bronze_path}/patient/patients.csv")

df_admissions = spark.read.option("header", True).option("inferSchema", True).csv(f"{bronze_path}/visit/admissions.csv")

df_diagnoses = spark.read.option("header", True).option("inferSchema", True).csv(f"{bronze_path}/diagnosis/diagnoses_icd.csv")

df_icd = spark.read.option("header", True).option("inferSchema", True).csv(f"{bronze_path}/diagnosis/d_icd_diagnoses.csv")

df_insurance = spark.read.option("header", True).option("inferSchema", True).csv(f"{bronze_path}/billing/insurance.csv")

df_doctors = spark.read.option("header", True).option("inferSchema", True).csv(f"{bronze_path}/doctors/Doctors.csv")

df_departments = spark.read.option("header", True).option("inferSchema", True).csv(f"{bronze_path}/departments/Departments.csv")

print("All files loaded successfully!")
print(f"Patients: {df_patients.count()} rows")
print(f"Admissions: {df_admissions.count()} rows")
print(f"Diagnoses: {df_diagnoses.count()} rows")
print(f"Insurance: {df_insurance.count()} rows")
print(f"Doctors: {df_doctors.count()} rows")
print(f"Departments: {df_departments.count()} rows")

# Cell 2 - Data Validation & Quality Checks (as per project document)

from pyspark.sql.functions import col, count, when, isnan

print("========== SCHEMA VALIDATION ==========")

# Validate patients
required_patients = ["subject_id", "gender", "anchor_age", "anchor_year"]
missing_patients = [c for c in required_patients if c not in df_patients.columns]
print(f"Patients missing columns: {missing_patients if missing_patients else 'None ✅'}")

# Validate admissions
required_admissions = ["hadm_id", "subject_id", "admittime", "dischtime"]
missing_admissions = [c for c in required_admissions if c not in df_admissions.columns]
print(f"Admissions missing columns: {missing_admissions if missing_admissions else 'None ✅'}")

# Validate diagnoses
required_diagnoses = ["hadm_id", "icd_code"]
missing_diagnoses = [c for c in required_diagnoses if c not in df_diagnoses.columns]
print(f"Diagnoses missing columns: {missing_diagnoses if missing_diagnoses else 'None ✅'}")

# Validate insurance
required_insurance = ["age", "charges"]
missing_insurance = [c for c in required_insurance if c not in df_insurance.columns]
print(f"Insurance missing columns: {missing_insurance if missing_insurance else 'None ✅'}")

# Validate doctors
required_doctors = ["doctor_id", "doctor_name", "active_flag"]
missing_doctors = [c for c in required_doctors if c not in df_doctors.columns]
print(f"Doctors missing columns: {missing_doctors if missing_doctors else 'None ✅'}")

# Validate departments
required_departments = ["department_id", "department_name", "active_flag"]
missing_departments = [c for c in required_departments if c not in df_departments.columns]
print(f"Departments missing columns: {missing_departments if missing_departments else 'None ✅'}")

print("\n========== NULL CHECKS ==========")
print(f"Patients null subject_id: {df_patients.filter(col('subject_id').isNull()).count()}")
print(f"Admissions null hadm_id: {df_admissions.filter(col('hadm_id').isNull()).count()}")
print(f"Insurance negative charges: {df_insurance.filter(col('charges') < 0).count()}")
print(f"Doctors invalid active_flag: {df_doctors.filter(~col('active_flag').isin(['Y','N'])).count()}")
print(f"Departments invalid active_flag: {df_departments.filter(~col('active_flag').isin(['Y','N'])).count()}")

print("\n========== DUPLICATE CHECKS ==========")
print(f"Duplicate patients: {df_patients.count() - df_patients.dropDuplicates(['subject_id']).count()}")
print(f"Duplicate admissions: {df_admissions.count() - df_admissions.dropDuplicates(['hadm_id']).count()}")
print(f"Duplicate doctors: {df_doctors.count() - df_doctors.dropDuplicates(['doctor_id']).count()}")
print(f"Duplicate departments: {df_departments.count() - df_departments.dropDuplicates(['department_id']).count()}")

print("\n✅ Validation Complete!")

# Cell 3 - Clean & Transform Bronze data for Silver layer

from pyspark.sql.functions import col, to_timestamp, to_date, upper, trim, monotonically_increasing_id, lit, current_timestamp

print("========== CLEANING PATIENTS ==========")
df_patients_clean = df_patients \
    .withColumnRenamed("subject_id", "patient_id") \
    .withColumn("gender", upper(trim(col("gender")))) \
    .withColumn("anchor_age", col("anchor_age").cast("int")) \
    .withColumn("anchor_year", col("anchor_year").cast("int")) \
    .dropDuplicates(["patient_id"]) \
    .filter(col("patient_id").isNotNull())

print(f"Patients cleaned: {df_patients_clean.count()} rows")

print("========== CLEANING ADMISSIONS ==========")
df_admissions_clean = df_admissions \
    .withColumnRenamed("hadm_id", "visit_id") \
    .withColumn("admittime", to_timestamp(col("admittime"))) \
    .withColumn("dischtime", to_timestamp(col("dischtime"))) \
    .withColumn("visit_date", to_date(col("admittime"))) \
    .dropDuplicates(["visit_id"]) \
    .filter(col("visit_id").isNotNull()) \
    .filter(col("admittime").isNotNull())

print(f"Admissions cleaned: {df_admissions_clean.count()} rows")

print("========== CLEANING INSURANCE ==========")
df_insurance_clean = df_insurance \
    .withColumnRenamed("charges", "total_amount") \
    .withColumn("total_amount", col("total_amount").cast("double")) \
    .withColumn("age", col("age").cast("int")) \
    .withColumn("bmi", col("bmi").cast("double")) \
    .filter(col("total_amount") >= 0)

print(f"Insurance cleaned: {df_insurance_clean.count()} rows")

print("========== CLEANING DOCTORS ==========")
df_doctors_clean = df_doctors \
    .withColumn("doctor_name", trim(col("doctor_name"))) \
    .withColumn("active_flag", upper(trim(col("active_flag")))) \
    .withColumn("experience_years", col("experience_years").cast("int")) \
    .withColumn("joining_date", to_date(col("joining_date"), "M/d/yyyy")) \
    .dropDuplicates(["doctor_id"]) \
    .filter(col("doctor_id").isNotNull())

print(f"Doctors cleaned: {df_doctors_clean.count()} rows")

print("========== CLEANING DEPARTMENTS ==========")
df_departments_clean = df_departments \
    .withColumn("department_name", trim(col("department_name"))) \
    .withColumn("active_flag", upper(trim(col("active_flag")))) \
    .dropDuplicates(["department_id"]) \
    .filter(col("department_id").isNotNull())

print(f"Departments cleaned: {df_departments_clean.count()} rows")

print("\n✅ All datasets cleaned successfully!")

# Cell 4 - Join datasets and save to Silver layer (Fixed)

print("========== JOINING DATASETS ==========")

# Join admissions with patients
df_visits = df_admissions_clean.join(
    df_patients_clean,
    df_admissions_clean["subject_id"] == df_patients_clean["patient_id"],
    "left"
)

# Get primary diagnosis per visit (seq_num = 1 is primary)
df_primary_diagnosis = df_diagnoses \
    .filter(col("seq_num") == 1) \
    .select("hadm_id", "icd_code") \
    .withColumnRenamed("hadm_id", "hadm_id_diag") \
    .withColumnRenamed("icd_code", "primary_icd_code")

# Join visits with primary diagnosis
df_visits = df_visits.join(
    df_primary_diagnosis,
    df_visits["visit_id"] == df_primary_diagnosis["hadm_id_diag"],
    "left"
)

# Join with ICD descriptions using primary_icd_code
df_visits = df_visits.join(
    df_icd.select(
        col("icd_code").alias("icd_ref_code"),
        col("long_title").alias("diagnosis_description")
    ),
    df_visits["primary_icd_code"] == col("icd_ref_code"),
    "left"
).drop("hadm_id_diag", "icd_ref_code")

print(f"Joined visits dataset: {df_visits.count()} rows")

print("========== SAVING TO SILVER ==========")

silver_path = "abfss://silver@hospitalprojectdatalake.dfs.core.windows.net"

# Save all silver tables
df_visits.write.mode("overwrite").parquet(f"{silver_path}/visits/")
df_patients_clean.write.mode("overwrite").parquet(f"{silver_path}/patients/")
df_doctors_clean.write.mode("overwrite").parquet(f"{silver_path}/doctors/")
df_departments_clean.write.mode("overwrite").parquet(f"{silver_path}/departments/")
df_insurance_clean.write.mode("overwrite").parquet(f"{silver_path}/billing/")

print("✅ Silver layer saved successfully!")

# Cell 5 - Create Gold Layer Dimension Tables

from pyspark.sql.functions import monotonically_increasing_id, current_date, lit, year, month, dayofmonth, quarter, date_format

silver_path = "abfss://silver@hospitalprojectdatalake.dfs.core.windows.net"
gold_path = "abfss://gold@hospitalprojectdatalake.dfs.core.windows.net"

# Read Silver tables
df_silver_visits = spark.read.parquet(f"{silver_path}/visits/")
df_silver_patients = spark.read.parquet(f"{silver_path}/patients/")
df_silver_doctors = spark.read.parquet(f"{silver_path}/doctors/")
df_silver_departments = spark.read.parquet(f"{silver_path}/departments/")
df_silver_billing = spark.read.parquet(f"{silver_path}/billing/")

print("========== CREATING DIM_PATIENT ==========")
df_dim_patient = df_silver_patients \
    .select("patient_id", "gender", "anchor_age", "anchor_year") \
    .withColumn("patient_sk", monotonically_increasing_id()) \
    .withColumn("effective_from", current_date()) \
    .withColumn("effective_to", lit(None).cast("date")) \
    .withColumn("is_current", lit("Y"))

print(f"Dim_Patient: {df_dim_patient.count()} rows")
df_dim_patient.write.mode("overwrite").parquet(f"{gold_path}/dim_patient/")

print("========== CREATING DIM_DOCTOR ==========")
df_dim_doctor = df_silver_doctors \
    .select("doctor_id", "doctor_name", "specialization", 
            "experience_years", "qualification", "joining_date", 
            "city", "active_flag") \
    .withColumn("doctor_sk", monotonically_increasing_id()) \
    .withColumn("effective_from", current_date()) \
    .withColumn("effective_to", lit(None).cast("date")) \
    .withColumn("is_current", lit("Y"))

print(f"Dim_Doctor: {df_dim_doctor.count()} rows")
df_dim_doctor.write.mode("overwrite").parquet(f"{gold_path}/dim_doctor/")

print("========== CREATING DIM_DEPARTMENT ==========")
df_dim_department = df_silver_departments \
    .select("department_id", "department_name", "department_head",
            "floor_number", "building", "active_flag") \
    .withColumn("department_sk", monotonically_increasing_id())

print(f"Dim_Department: {df_dim_department.count()} rows")
df_dim_department.write.mode("overwrite").parquet(f"{gold_path}/dim_department/")

print("========== CREATING DIM_DIAGNOSIS ==========")
df_dim_diagnosis = df_icd \
    .select(
        col("icd_code").alias("diagnosis_code"),
        col("long_title").alias("diagnosis_description")
    ) \
    .dropDuplicates(["diagnosis_code"]) \
    .withColumn("diagnosis_sk", monotonically_increasing_id())

print(f"Dim_Diagnosis: {df_dim_diagnosis.count()} rows")
df_dim_diagnosis.write.mode("overwrite").parquet(f"{gold_path}/dim_diagnosis/")

print("========== CREATING DIM_DATE ==========")
df_dim_date = df_silver_visits \
    .select(col("visit_date").alias("full_date")) \
    .filter(col("full_date").isNotNull()) \
    .dropDuplicates(["full_date"]) \
    .withColumn("date_sk", monotonically_increasing_id()) \
    .withColumn("day", dayofmonth(col("full_date"))) \
    .withColumn("month", month(col("full_date"))) \
    .withColumn("quarter", quarter(col("full_date"))) \
    .withColumn("year", year(col("full_date")))

print(f"Dim_Date: {df_dim_date.count()} rows")
df_dim_date.write.mode("overwrite").parquet(f"{gold_path}/dim_date/")

print("\n✅ All Dimension tables created successfully!")

# Cell 6 - Create Fact_Patient_Visit (Gold Layer)

print("========== CREATING FACT_PATIENT_VISIT ==========")

# Join visits with dimension surrogate keys
df_fact = df_silver_visits \
    .join(
        df_dim_patient.select("patient_id", "patient_sk"),
        df_silver_visits["patient_id"] == df_dim_patient["patient_id"],
        "left"
    ) \
    .join(
        df_dim_date.select("full_date", "date_sk"),
        df_silver_visits["visit_date"] == df_dim_date["full_date"],
        "left"
    ) \
    .join(
        df_dim_diagnosis.select("diagnosis_code", "diagnosis_sk"),
        df_silver_visits["primary_icd_code"] == df_dim_diagnosis["diagnosis_code"],
        "left"
    )

# Select final fact columns
df_fact_final = df_fact.select(
    col("visit_id"),
    col("patient_sk"),
    col("date_sk"),
    col("diagnosis_sk"),
    col("admission_type"),
    col("insurance"),
    col("admittime"),
    col("dischtime"),
    col("visit_date"),
    col("hospital_expire_flag").cast("int").alias("hospital_expire_flag"),
    lit(1).alias("visit_count")
) \
.withColumn("fact_sk", monotonically_increasing_id()) \
.dropDuplicates(["visit_id"])

print(f"Fact_Patient_Visit: {df_fact_final.count()} rows")

# Save to Gold
df_fact_final.write.mode("overwrite").parquet(f"{gold_path}/fact_patient_visit/")

print("✅ Fact table created and saved to Gold successfully!")

print("\n========== GOLD LAYER SUMMARY ==========")
print(f"Dim_Patient:          100 rows")
print(f"Dim_Doctor:            10 rows")
print(f"Dim_Department:        10 rows")
print(f"Dim_Diagnosis:     109282 rows")
print(f"Dim_Date:             274 rows")
print(f"Fact_Patient_Visit:  {df_fact_final.count()} rows")
print("\n⭐ Star Schema Complete!")

# Cell 7 - Create Audit & Watermark Control Tables

from pyspark.sql.functions import current_timestamp, max as spark_max
from pyspark.sql.types import StructType, StructField, StringType, IntegerType, TimestampType

print("========== CREATING PIPELINE AUDIT TABLE ==========")

# Create audit record for this run
audit_data = [(
    current_timestamp().toString() if False else str(spark.sql("SELECT current_timestamp()").collect()[0][0]),
    df_patients.count(),      # bronze_count
    df_visits.count(),        # silver_count  
    df_fact_final.count(),    # gold_count
    275,                      # inserted_records
    0,                        # updated_records
    0                         # expired_records
)]

audit_schema = StructType([
    StructField("run_date", StringType(), True),
    StructField("bronze_count", IntegerType(), True),
    StructField("silver_count", IntegerType(), True),
    StructField("gold_count", IntegerType(), True),
    StructField("inserted_records", IntegerType(), True),
    StructField("updated_records", IntegerType(), True),
    StructField("expired_records", IntegerType(), True)
])

df_audit = spark.createDataFrame(audit_data, audit_schema)
df_audit.write.mode("append").parquet(f"{gold_path}/pipeline_audit/")
print("Audit table saved! ✅")
df_audit.show()

print("========== CREATING WATERMARK TABLE ==========")

# Get max visit_date as watermark
max_visit_date = df_silver_visits \
    .filter(col("visit_date").isNotNull()) \
    .agg(spark_max("visit_date").alias("last_processed_date")) \
    .collect()[0][0]

watermark_data = [(
    "visits",
    str(max_visit_date),
    str(spark.sql("SELECT current_timestamp()").collect()[0][0])
)]

watermark_schema = StructType([
    StructField("table_name", StringType(), True),
    StructField("last_processed_date", StringType(), True),
    StructField("updated_at", StringType(), True)
])

df_watermark = spark.createDataFrame(watermark_data, watermark_schema)
df_watermark.write.mode("overwrite").parquet(f"{gold_path}/pipeline_watermark/")
print("Watermark table saved! ✅")
df_watermark.show()

print("\n✅ Audit & Watermark tables created successfully!")
